violations.description: CROSS CONTAMINATION (5 pts): Food noted being prepared on the same location as personal phone is sitting. Do not strore phone on prep tables while tables are being used for food prep.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors and walls around cooking equipment and other in place equipment noted in need of cleaning.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Reachin cooler interiors noted not clean.
CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Food (Sauces) noted being stored not covered in walk-in cooler
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Can opener not properly maintained.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors and walls around cooking equipment and other in place equipment noted in need of cleaning.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Reachin cooler door gaskets and interiors and walkin cooler fan guards noted not clean.
